sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Whip Attack
special_mechanics.description: Harry Jr. can fight enemies with his whip

special_mechanics.name: Projectile Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Sling stones, boomerangs, and explosives can be shot at enemies. Sling stones can be charged for a determined time period to perform a powerful shot

special_mechanics.name: Crouch Traverse
special_mechanics.description: Harry Jr. can crouch by pressing both down and the jump button, allowing traversal of enclosed areas

special_mechanics.name: Climbing and Swinging
special_mechanics.description: Harry Jr. can traverse stages by climbing and swinging

special_mechanics.name: Checkpoint Respawn
special_mechanics.description: When Harry Jr. is killed, he respawns on the nearest checkpoint reached

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Available sources contain only gameplay descriptions, stage structure, and development history. No quantitative physics parameters, frame data, or movement values are documented. This game requires reverse-engineering or ROM analysis for precise movement physics extraction.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (TCRF) - Pitfall: The Mayan Adventure (SNES)
